Welcome to Darul Raza
International Ruhani Center And Islamic Institute

International Ruhani Center Darul Raza Is Situated In Pakistan Having Primary Office In Jhang Punjab. It was founded in 8th Rabi uthani   as of 5th December 2019, Its Founder Is Mawlana Abu Numan Muhammad Irfan Khalifa of Breili Shareef. His Tireless Work leads this organization to great success and achieving major milestone.

For more development Darul Raza Organization is divided into some major section including:

  1. Darul Raza Online Academy
  2. Darul Raza Social Welfare
  3. Department Of Hifz And Nazra Of Quran ul Alkareem
  4. Department Of Spirituality (Ruhaniyat)
  5. Darul Raza Publications (Maktaba DarulRaza)
  6. Department of Durood o Salam
  7. Department Of Takhassus fil Fiqh etc.…

Darul Raza have many departments, In which Darul Raza is working round the clock to serve distressed Ummat Of Rasool ALLAH     ﷺ with full energy

Start In The Name Of Allah
Islamic Center Services
Ethical & Moral Beliefs That Guides To The Straight Path!
Islamic Online Academy

Dedicatedly continuous Islamic Courses teaching via online virtual classes

Darul Raza Social Welfare

Organized voluntary social welfare for poor needy muslims

READ MORE
Hifz And Nazra Of Quran ul Alkareem

Teaching Tajweed & Helping Hifz ul Qur’aan Alkareem online and physically free of any cost

READ MORE
Department Of Spirituality (Ruhaniyat)

Providing Tawezaat & Wazaif to worried people of Ummat e Muslimah

READ MORE
Darul Raza Publications (Maktabatul DarulRaza)

Independent publication house that publishes and distribute Islamic books throughout the world

READ MORE
Department of Durood o Salam

Trying to spread Durood o Salam to every tongue of muslim
